tasks.title: Music synthesis engine — pentatonic music-box melody
tasks.description: Create a Web Audio API music engine that synthesizes a gentle, looping toy-train melody. Use pentatonic scale (C5, D5, E5, G5, A5) with music-box timbre (combination of sine + triangle oscillators with fast attack and medium decay). 16-bar loop with varied rhythm patterns. The melody should feel like a toy music box — gentle, child-friendly, not annoying on repeat.
acceptance_criteria: Music synthesized entirely via Web Audio API (no external files)
Uses pentatonic scale for pleasant, non-dissonant sound
Music-box timbre (sparkly, bell-like tone)
16-bar loop that doesn't feel monotonously repetitive
Melody is gentle and suitable for toddlers

tasks.title: Separate music volume control
tasks.description: Add a dedicated music volume slider independent of SFX. Add a music toggle button (🎵) in the controls bar. Music has its own GainNode routed through masterGainNode so the master mute still works. Separate localStorage key for music volume and enabled state.
acceptance_criteria: Music volume slider independent of SFX volume
🎵 button toggles music on/off
Master mute (🔇) still silences music
Music volume preference saved to localStorage
Music enabled state saved to localStorage

tasks.title: Play state variation — more upbeat during play
tasks.description: When trains are playing, shift to a slightly more upbeat variation: faster tempo and slightly higher volume. When idle (not playing), use a slower, gentler variation. Transition smoothly between states.
acceptance_criteria: Idle tempo is gentle/slow (~100 BPM)
Play tempo is slightly faster (~120 BPM)
Transition between states doesn't cause audio glitch
Tempo change happens on next bar boundary (not mid-note)

tasks.title: Night mode variation — slower, softer
tasks.description: In night mode, music plays at slower tempo (~80 BPM), lower volume, and possibly lower octave for a lullaby feel. Transition smoothly when night mode is toggled.
acceptance_criteria: Night mode music is noticeably slower and softer
Toggling night mode transitions music smoothly
Night + play state uses moderate tempo (not as fast as day play)

tasks.title: Default off + autoplay policy compliance
tasks.description: Music defaults to OFF (respecting users who prefer silence). Only starts on explicit user action (clicking 🎵 button). Complies with browser autoplay policy by requiring user interaction. State persists — if user enabled music, it auto-starts on next visit after first interaction.
acceptance_criteria: Music is OFF by default on first visit
Clicking 🎵 starts music (first user interaction)
Music preference persists across refreshes
No autoplay policy console errors
Returning users with music enabled get music on first click/interaction

tasks.title: Add M keyboard shortcut for music toggle
tasks.description: Add 'M' key as keyboard shortcut to toggle music on/off. Add to shortcuts modal.
acceptance_criteria: M key toggles music
Shortcut appears in shortcuts modal
Doesn't fire when typing in inputs

testing_focus: Music doesn't interfere with SFX (train sounds, placement sounds)
Master mute silences both music and SFX
Night mode variation transitions are smooth
No memory leaks from music oscillators
Music stops cleanly when toggled off
